tracks.meaning: a repeated decorative design or sequence of colors and shapes in fabric or wallpaper
a reusable template or model used in software design to solve common programming problems
a consistent tendency, habit, or characteristic way of behaving or thinking
a sequence of numbers or shapes that follows a recognizable rule or formula
to make or design something following a repeated or systematic structure
a model or example used as a guide for creating or producing something
the typical sequence or trend of climatic conditions over a period
a recognizable sequence of data or behavior in a system or user activity
a consistent theme or recurring element in speech, writing, or media
the normal or expected way something typically happens or is done
